# Orionfold

> Orionfold helps small teams own the AI capabilities they are already trying
> to buy: private agents, domain models, benchmarks, and playbooks that run on
> hardware the customer controls. Everything is open and built on real,
> working code. The first paid product is Arena Field Edition: a turnkey,
> proven private AI lab on the NVIDIA DGX Spark. Orionfold is a member of
> NVIDIA Inception.

## Buy
- [Arena Field Edition](https://orionfold.com/software/arena/): The paid edition of the free Orionfold Arena. One installer turns an NVIDIA DGX Spark into a private AI lab with an AI research teammate (agents, domain models, and tests). It proves itself on first boot with a verifiable receipt and stays proven for a year, every update re-gated and re-receipted. The software stays free and open; what you buy is the assembled, proven team delivered turnkey. $349 founding for the first 25 licenses, then $499 one time with a 12-month kept-proven window; $149/yr renewal after year one.

## Flagship paths
- [Arena](https://orionfold.com/cockpit/): Orionfold Arena is the cockpit for local AI: run, compare, score, and train models on your own desktop. Arena Field Edition delivers the whole stack on an NVIDIA DGX Spark as a turnkey, proven lab; Cortex memory and the fieldkit toolkit are the stack around it.
- [Workflows](https://orionfold.com/workflows/): Private Agent Starter Kits. One local workflow with a trigger, runner, evaluation, approval loop, artifact output, and audit trail.
- [Experts](https://orionfold.com/experts/): Offline domain models with benchmarks and playbooks for sensitive work. Patent Strategist is the live flagship pack.
- [Advisor](https://orionfold.com/advisor/): A governed local AI advisor over your own documents: every answer names its exact source, unsupported questions get a refusal, and every check it passed is a receipt you can re-run. Live; the trained model is free on Hugging Face.
- [Learn](https://orionfold.com/learn/): Books, field notes, the DGX Spark Field Lab, and build stories that teach the operating model.

## Proof libraries
- [Proof](https://orionfold.com/proof/): The receipts wall. Every capability claim links to a test you can run yourself and get the same result. It shows where the small local models already win, and where the big cloud models still lead.
- [Receipts](https://orionfold.com/receipts/): Every receipt on its own page: a frozen test you can rerun, the run itself, and what we found. The proof, not the pitch.
- [Software](https://orionfold.com/software/): Open software to run private AI workflows. Orionfold Arena, Advisor, and Cortex lead the catalog, with the AI Native Platform and API, apps, and developer tools behind them.
- [Models](https://orionfold.com/models/): Open-weight AI models tuned for patents, security, law, finance, medicine, and space math. Free to download and run offline.
- [DGX Spark](https://orionfold.com/dgx-spark/): Built on the NVIDIA stack. The book, open models, and tools all proven on the NVIDIA DGX Spark, a small AI supercomputer that runs on one desk with no cloud.
- [Books](https://orionfold.com/books/): Implementation playbooks. The AI Native Business book, AI research on the NVIDIA DGX Spark, and Field Notes. Built on working code.
- [Story](https://orionfold.com/story/): Building in public. Honest notes on what we shipped, what broke, and what we learned.
- [Letter](https://orionfold.com/letter/): A monthly letter from the founder. Plain notes on the bet behind Orionfold, with sources you can check.
- [Adoption](https://orionfold.com/adoption/): What is shipped, what is being built, and what sponsors can fund next.

## More
- [About](https://orionfold.com/about/): Manav Sehgal, the builder behind Orionfold. Twenty-five years building AI, from Xerox PARC to Alexa Conversations and Amazon Nova, now folded into one startup for the solo builder.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/manavsehgal): Source code and open projects.
- [Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/Orionfold): Open-weight models to download.

## Optional
- [Privacy](https://orionfold.com/privacy/): How we handle data.
- [Terms](https://orionfold.com/terms/): Terms of use.
